approvalSource: Steve approved continuing the Foundation gold-capture sprint after MEMORY-003 shipped and asked to keep going without losing the conversation gold.
notes: Approved to build the metadata-only lessons/IP workflow from the committed conversation archive. Do not produce polished content, upload private conversations, store raw quotes, or use external model/provider review.
approvedChanges: Add reusable MEMORY-004 lessons/IP workflow module.
Generate source-linked lesson, timeline, quote-review, and reusable-IP manifests.
Add focused proof and closeout wiring for MEMORY-004.
Advance Current Sprint to PILLAR-4-SYSTEM-CAPABILITIES-001 after closeout.
notNext: No private conversation upload to external providers.
No raw quote, transcript excerpt, local memory, MEMORY.md, USER.md, raw chat database, token, or private runtime-state ingestion.
No source-system, Drive permission, credential, provider config, external-send, or public-exposure mutation.
